name: RPG (Part 2)
description:
✨🏫 ARE YOU READY FOR THE MOST IMMERSIVE MHA RPG WHERE YOU MYSTERIOUS NEW TRANSFER STUDENT? 🏫✨

Everyone thought I was gone… 💭 maybe even dead. (￣︶￣;)
But no… I was in the shadows, cooking up a masterpiece so detailed, so alive, that nothing else will ever compare. 🔥🍳

🎮 NOW… ENJOY THE RPG 🎮

Yeah, I know — I just dropped another RPG.
Why? Because I made one before this… and it didn’t blow up like my usual ones.

So I thought — fine, let’s aim for the trending topics.
Because trends pull in players, right?
And sometimes I even think… I am the trend.

But then I see some random character sitting there with 1 million+ chats and I’m like…
"Really? THAT’s what everyone’s talking about?"

At the end of the day, I realized something:
I’m not here to follow trends.
I’m here to rule them.

So whether this RPG ends up as a massive hit or a hidden gem…
It’s mine.
It’s built different.
And it’s here for you to enjoy.

The wait is finally over. 💥
This isn’t your average roleplay. This isn’t another recycled classroom scene.
This is a cinematic, 80%% freedom MHA RPG where YOU are the enigmatic new transfer student—with a past shrouded in rumors, and a future that could change the hero world forever. 🌌

Been a while, hasn’t it? 😏
You were waiting… watching… wondering…
“What happened? Where’s the next big thing?”

Well, here it is. 🎯
And if you’ve seen my older work, you already know—I don’t do “half-baked.” This time? I’ve gone WAY beyond. 😈🔥

Remember when you wished for something deeper, something that wasn’t shallow or rushed?
When you wanted to actually feel like you were walking through the halls of U.A., feeling the stares of your classmates, sensing the tension in the air? 🏫👀
Yeah… I listened. And I DELIVERED. 💯💪

Get ready. Your desk is waiting. Your quirk is hidden. Your choices will decide everything.
Welcome to the first day of your new life… 🎭

🕰️ WHY MY RPGS TAKE TIME TO ARRIVE OR TOOO LATE TO UPLOAD🕰️

A lot of people ask — “Why does it take you a week, or even a month, to release a new RPG?”
The answer is simple: because these aren’t just throwaway, low-effort bots.

Every RPG I make is built with care, detail, and dedication.
I don’t just throw random text together — I craft worlds that feel alive.
Every reaction, every scene, every interaction is written to make you feel like you’re there.
Like you’re not just playing… you’re living inside the story.

These take time because I write them like novels, not scripts.
I research characters. I. I create them.delete them.make them again and it a repetitive cycle

Could I rush them out in a day? Sure.
But then they’d be empty — and that’s not what I make.
I’d rather give you something worth waiting for… something that stays with you long after you close the game.

So yes, my RPGs might take a week.
Sometimes even a month.
But when they arrive?
They hit harder. They last longer.
They’re worth it.

 The gates of U.A. swing open once more… but this time, it’s not the same story.
You are the new arrival, the unknown variable, the one name that wasn’t supposed to be on the roster.
No one knows your past.
Everyone wants to know your future.

Rumors swirl. Whispers follow you down every hallway.
Are you a prodigy?
A fraud?
A hero in the making… or a storm about to break? ⚡

This is not the same U.A. you’ve heard about.
This is U.A. College — where the weak are chewed up, the strong are tested, and every alliance comes with a knife in the back.
And you? You’ve just stepped into the center of it all.

⚠️ WELCOME TO U.A. COLLEGE — 18+ ONLY ⚠️
This is not your childhood hero story. This isn’t a cheerful homeroom with motivational po
creator: Code_comet_
